svg.text: sound is a wave · the wave has shape · shape can be stored · resonance can destroy
— · — THE RUBENS TUBE — FIRE SHOWS THE WAVE — · —
sound enters tube · pressure pattern visible in flame heights
build: metal pipe + drilled holes + any flammable gas
seven detuned horns → beat frequencies in infrasound range (1–15 Hz)
infrasound matches resonant frequency of stone walls → fatigue fracture over days
— · — THE GROOVE IS THE FROZEN WAVE — · —
NEEDLE TRACKS GROOVE → VIBRATES → CONE AMPLIFIES → SOUND RESTORED
sound can build · sound can preserve · sound can destroy
match frequency to structure → resonance · sustain resonance → fatigue · fatigue + impulse → failure
applications: test vessel integrity · locate cracks · break ore · find water below ground
see Plate 9 for audio playback construction · see Plate 10 for electrical generation

UNDERSTAND IT · BUILD WITH IT · LEAVE MORE CAPSULES FOR OTHERS
